landingpage.aSoluoCompletaParaDigitalizarM:
The complete solution for digitizing museums and historic cities.
                    Engage visitors with gamification, comply with the Rouanet Law with excellence and have full control of your collection.
landingpage.tecnologiaAServioDaCultura: Technology at the Service of Culture
landingpage.tudoOQueVocPrecisaParaModerniz: Everything you need to modernize your institution.
landingpage.sistemaDeXpConquistasENveisQue:
XP, achievements and levels system that turns the visit into an engaging journey.
                            Increase retention and interest among young audiences with interactive challenges.
landingpage.semNecessidadeDeDownloadNasLoj:
No need to download from stores. Your visitors instantly access the multimedia guide
                            through smart QR Codes spread throughout the collection.
landingpage.mapasInterativosRoteirosSugeri:
Interactive maps, AI-suggested routes and integration with the local economy.
                            Connect your museum to the city's ecosystem.
landingpage.garantaAAprovaoDaSuaPrestaoDeC: Ensure approval of your financial statements. Our platform already comes with the required technical suite, and we offer content production as a service.
landingpage.janelaDeVdeoIntegradaAoPlayer: Video window integrated into the player
landingpage.narraoDescritivaParaDeficiente: Descriptive narration for the visually impaired
landingpage.nossaEquipeDeEspecialistasProd: Our team of experts produces Libras videos and audio descriptions for your collection.
landingpage.tireSuasDvidasSobreALeiRouanet: Ask your questions about the Rouanet Law, Plans and Implementation.
landingpage.junteseAosMuseusEProjetosCultu:
Join the museums and cultural projects that are already in the future.
                    Create your space right now.
